source: final v1.5 full live layout merged with v1.6 right-hand mouse lock, v1.7 RPG/game layer, and Layer 8 pointer travel overlay
policy: Operational layout: v1.5 Balanced-Plus plus right-hand mouse lock, RPG/game Layer 7, Layer 8 pointer-travel overlay, and PMW3610 calm-default/high-travel firmware tuning documented separately.

changes.label: Game
changes.rationale: Optional left-side entry: hold Nav x3 y4, tap x0 y1 to lock into RPG/Game Layer 7.

changes.label: Find
changes.rationale: v1.5 Ctrl+F on support column, replacing duplicate F8.

changes.label: Prev Word
changes.rationale: v1.5 Ctrl+Left near arrow cluster.

changes.label: Del Prev Word
changes.rationale: v1.5 Ctrl+Backspace using the board Backspace/Delete key name.

changes.label: Next Word
changes.rationale: v1.5 Ctrl+Right, replacing duplicate Page Down.

changes.label: Replace
changes.rationale: v1.5 Ctrl+H on support column, replacing duplicate F12.

changes.label: Base
changes.rationale: Right-thumb exit from locked Mouse Layer 2 back to Base.

changes.label: Base
changes.rationale: Second right-thumb exit from locked Mouse Layer 2 back to Base.

changes.label: Monitor L
changes.rationale: v1.5 Win+Shift+Left, replacing duplicate Win+D.

changes.label: App 5
changes.rationale: v1.5 Win+5, replacing duplicate Win+4.

changes.label: Mouse Lock
changes.rationale: Right-hand-only mouse entry: hold Window x8 y4, tap x10 y2, release to stay on Mouse Layer 2.

changes.label: Ptr Travel
changes.rationale: Toggle high-speed pointer travel overlay: hold Window x8 y4, tap x11 y2. Layer 8 is transparent except exit keys.

changes.label: Game
changes.rationale: Optional right-side entry: hold Window x8 y4, tap x12 y2 to lock into RPG/Game Layer 7.

changes.label: Monitor R
changes.rationale: v1.5 Win+Shift+Right, replacing duplicate Win+Right.

changes.label: PgUp/LB
changes.rationale: Left shoulder/tab/page key for RPG menus.

changes.label: Up
changes.rationale: Left-hand WASD-style movement: W position sends Up.

changes.label: PgDn/RB
changes.rationale: Right shoulder/tab/page key for RPG menus.

changes.label: PgUp/LB
changes.rationale: Right-hand menu shoulder previous page.

changes.label: Up
changes.rationale: Right-hand arrow cluster: Up.

changes.label: PgDn/RB
changes.rationale: Right-hand menu shoulder next page.

changes.label: Left
changes.rationale: Left-hand WASD-style movement: A position sends Left.

changes.label: Down
changes.rationale: Left-hand WASD-style movement: S position sends Down.

changes.label: Right
changes.rationale: Left-hand WASD-style movement: D position sends Right.

changes.label: Confirm
changes.rationale: RPG Maker-style confirm/action key on the left prime row.

changes.label: Left
changes.rationale: Right-hand arrow cluster: Left.

changes.label: Down
changes.rationale: Right-hand arrow cluster: Down.

changes.label: Right
changes.rationale: Right-hand arrow cluster: Right.

changes.label: Cancel
changes.rationale: RPG Maker-style cancel/menu-back key near the movement cluster.

changes.label: Menu
changes.rationale: Common alternate action/menu key for games that use Z/X/C patterns.

changes.label: Dash
changes.rationale: Dash/run modifier for RPG movement.

changes.label: Esc/Menu
changes.rationale: Escape/menu key for pause/cancel in RPG Maker-style games.

changes.label: Confirm
changes.rationale: Right-hand confirm/action key.

changes.label: Cancel
changes.rationale: Right-hand cancel/back key.

changes.label: Menu
changes.rationale: Right-hand alternate action/menu key.

changes.label: Dash
changes.rationale: Right-hand dash/run modifier.

changes.label: Esc/Menu
changes.rationale: Right-hand escape/menu key.

changes.label: Exit Base
changes.rationale: Left-thumb exit from RPG/Game Layer 7 back to Base.

changes.label: Space/Confirm
changes.rationale: Thumb confirm/action for games that accept Space.

changes.label: Exit Base
changes.rationale: Left support/thumb exit from RPG/Game Layer 7 back to Base.

changes.label: Exit Base
changes.rationale: Right-thumb exit from RPG/Game Layer 7 back to Base.

changes.label: Exit Base
changes.rationale: Second right-thumb exit from RPG/Game Layer 7 back to Base.

changes.label: Click
changes.rationale: Optional left click for RPGs that use mouse interaction.

changes.label: Right Click
changes.rationale: Optional right click/menu for mouse-enabled RPGs.

changes.label: Enter/Confirm
changes.rationale: Right-thumb confirm/action for games that accept Enter.

changes.label: Exit Travel
changes.rationale: Right-thumb exit from Pointer Travel Layer 8 back to Base precision mode.

changes.label: Exit Travel
changes.rationale: Second right-thumb exit from Pointer Travel Layer 8 back to Base precision mode.
